name: Multiple back injuries over years at work, total disability in Idaho?
description: If combined total you; need expert testimony.

mainEntity.name: Multiple back injuries over years at work, total disability in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: If combined total you; need expert testimony.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possible if combined render unable to work; ISIF may cover pre-existing.**

Idaho Commission assesses if latest caused total perm disability.[5]

- Expert on combo effect.
- Prior returns to work hurt claim.
- Referee findings key.

Attorney argues for max benefits.[5]
